##SOURCE=Gemological Institute of America
##DESCRIPTION=A cut (1.15ct) alexandrite gemstone, blue-green under fluorescent light, which appears purple under halogen light; flux grown.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110103
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
